evals.name: dental-software-market
evals.prompt: Investiga el mercado de software de gestión de clínicas dentales en España. Quiero entender quiénes son los players, qué modelos de pricing usan y dónde hay oportunidades. Cliente: Growth4U. Stakeholder: Alfonso.
evals.expected_output: Analytical narrative document about dental software market in Spain. Should read like a consulting report, NOT a list of sources/steps. Raw folder with extracts.

assertions.description: Output is narrative prose, not a process log or source dump
No sections listing 'searches performed' or 'steps followed'
Sources appear only in References section at the end, cited inline as [N]
Raw folder created with source extracts
Executive summary is standalone and readable

evals.name: fintech-remesas-latam
evals.prompt: Haz un deep research sobre cómo las fintechs europeas (Revolut, N26, Wise) están abordando el mercado de remesas a Latinoamérica. Para un cliente que quiere entrar en ese espacio. Cliente: Growth4U. Stakeholder: Alfonso.
evals.expected_output: Comparative analytical document about European fintechs in LATAM remittances. Entity-by-entity analysis as prose, not data cards. Raw folder with extracts.

assertions.description: Per-entity sections are analytical prose, not data sheets
Comparison table exists but is accompanied by narrative analysis
Implications and non-obvious findings section present
Raw folder with framework-notes.md and extracts/
Recommendations are specific and actionable, not generic

evals.name: regulacion-estetica-rrss
evals.prompt: Investiga la regulación de publicidad de tratamientos médico-estéticos en redes sociales en España. Qué se puede y qué no se puede hacer. Cliente: Growth4U. Stakeholder: Alfonso.
evals.expected_output: Regulatory analysis document that explains the landscape clearly. A reader should understand what's allowed and what's not. Not a list of legal sources. Raw folder.

assertions.description: Complex regulatory info is explained in clear narrative, not just cited
Practical implications for marketers are clear
No process narration (searched X, then Y, found Z...)
Document answers 'what can I do' not just 'what does the law say'
